heading: Political activity permitted; employees residing in certain municipalities
label: 7325 Political activity permitted; employees residing in certain municipalities
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 7325, , , ; , , , related to penalties, prior to the general revision of this subchapter by .Pub. L. 89–55480 Stat. 526Pub. L. 96–54, § 2(a)(44)93 Stat. 384Pub. L. 103–94Sept. 6, 1966Aug. 14, 1979

Amendments2012—Par. (1). amended par. (1) generally. Prior to amendment, par. (1) read as follows: “the municipality or political subdivision is in Maryland or Virginia and in the immediate vicinity of the District of Columbia, or is a municipality in which the majority of voters are employed by the Government of the United States; and”.Pub. L. 112–2301996— inserted “and paragraph (2) of section 7323(b)” after “section 7323(a)”.Pub. L. 104–93
Effective Date of 2012 AmendmentAmendment by effective 30 days after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 112–230section 5(a) of Pub. L. 112–230section 1501 of this titleDec. 28, 2012

children.label: B
children.text: in Maryland or Virginia and in the immediate vicinity of the District of Columbia; or

children.label: C
children.text: a municipality in which the majority of voters are employed by the Government of the United States; and

the Office determines that because of special or unusual circumstances which exist in the municipality or political subdivision it is in the domestic interest of the employees and individuals to permit that political participation.
